name: e-Gift Card
shortDescription: The perfect last-minute gift. Delivered directly to their inbox within minutes.
description: Our e-Gift Cards are the fastest and most convenient way to show someone you care. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or last-minute surprises, these digital cards can be customized with a personal message and sent directly to the recipient's email address either immediately or scheduled for a future date. They can be redeemed online or in-store for any of our high-quality pet supplies, fish, or services.
features: Instant email delivery or schedule for later
No expiration date or maintenance fees
terms: Redeemable for merchandise and services at Sierra Fish & Pets. Not refundable or redeemable for cash, except as required by law. Lost or stolen digital codes cannot be replaced.

name: Traditional Gift Card
tagline: Classic physical card sent by mail
shortDescription: A beautiful, premium physical card packaged in a gift-ready envelope.
description: Prefer a tangible gift? Our Traditional Gift Cards are printed on premium plastic cards with a sleek, glossy finish and come housed inside a beautiful, presentation-ready gift sleeve. We can mail them directly to you or send them straight to the recipient's shipping address with custom packaging. Perfect for placing under the tree, tucked into a card, or handing over in person.
features: Premium physical plastic card with glossy finish
Comes with a free decorative gift envelope
Sent via standard or expedited mail shipping
No fees and no expiration date
terms: Treat this card like cash. Redeemable for merchandise and services at Sierra Fish & Pets. Lost or stolen physical cards cannot be replaced without original proof of purchase.
